2603.18507.title: Expert Personas Improve LLM Alignment but Damage Accuracy: Bootstrapping Intent-Based Persona Routing with PRISM
2603.18507.paper_summary: Persona prompting can steer LLM generation towards a domain-specific tone and pattern. This behavior enables use cases in multi-agent systems where diverse interactions are crucial and human-centered tasks require high-level human alignment. Prior works provide mixed opinions on their utility: some report performance gains when using expert personas for certain domains and their contribution to data diversity in synthetic data creation, while others find near-zero or negative impact on general utility. To fully leverage the benefits of the LLM persona and avoid its harmfulness, a more comprehensive investigation of the mechanism is crucial. In this work, we study how model optimization, task type, prompt length, and placement can impact expert persona effectiveness across instruction-tuned and reasoning LLMs, and provide insight into conditions under which expert personas fail and succeed. Based on our findings, we developed a pipeline to fully leverage the benefits of an expert persona, named PRISM (Persona Routing via Intent-based Self-Modeling), which self-distills an intent-conditioned expert persona into a gated LoRA adapter through a bootstrapping process that requires no external data, models, or knowledge. PRISM enhances human preference and safety alignment on generative tasks while maintaining accuracy on discriminative tasks across all models, with minimal memory and computing overhead.
2603.18507.paper_summary_zh: Persona 提示可以引導 LLM 生成朝向特定領域的語調和模式。<lb/>這種行為使得在多代理系統中使用案例成為可能，因為多樣的互動至關重要，而以人為中心的任務需要高水平的人類對齊。<lb/>先前的研究對其效用提供了不同的看法：一些報告在某些領域使用專家角色時的性能提升，以及它們對合成數據創建中數據多樣性的貢獻，而另一些則發現對一般效用的影響接近零或為負。<lb/>為了充分利用 LLM 角色的好處並避免其有害性，對其機制進行更全面的研究至關重要。<lb/>在本研究中，我們探討了模型優化、任務類型、提示長度和位置如何影響專家角色在指令調整和推理 LLM 中的有效性，並提供了專家角色失敗和成功的條件的見解。<lb/>根據我們的發現，我們開發了一個管道來充分利用專家角色的好處，名為 PRISM（基於意圖的自我建模的角色路由），它通過一個不需要外部數據、模型或知識的啟動過程，自我提煉出一個意圖條件的專家角色到一個門控 LoRA 適配器中。<lb/>PRISM 在生成任務上增強了人類偏好和安全對齊，同時在所有模型的區分任務上保持準確性，並且內存和計算開銷最小。
2603.18507.author: Zizhao Hu et.al.
2603.18507.authors: Zizhao Hu, Mohammad Rostami, Jesse Thomason
